task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with required columns and values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application open showing a table or CSV text with headers 'soa_offset' and 'corrAns', and at least 5 rows of data. The offsets should range from -0.3 to 0.3, with 'corrAns' being 'y' for 0 and 'n' otherwise.

task_completion.description: Save the PsychoPy experiment to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy main window title bar displays 'av_simultaneity.psyexp' or a save dialog shows this filename being saved in the /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ directory.

task_completion.description: Set up the experiment flow with instructions, trial, and a loop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flow panel in PsychoPy (usually at the bottom) shows an instructions routine, followed by a trial routine, with a loop surrounding the trial routine.

task_completion.description: Link the loop to the conditions file and set nReps to 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Loop Properties dialog is open, showing 'nReps' set to 1 and the Conditions field containing 'soa_conditions.csv' (or the path to it).

task_completion.description: Configure the visual stimulus to start at 0.5s and last 0.1s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual component (e.g., Polygon, Image, or Text) Properties dialog is open, showing the Start time as 0.5 and Stop duration as 0.1.

task_completion.description: Configure the sound stimulus to start based on soa_offset and last 0.1s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Sound component Properties dialog is open, showing the Start time field containing the variable 'soa_offset' (e.g., '0.5 + soa_offset') and Stop duration as 0.1.

task_completion.description: Configure the keyboard response to accept 'y' and 'n' and record the correct answer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Keyboard component Properties dialog is open, showing Allowed keys containing 'y' and 'n', the 'Store correct' box checked, and the Correct answer field likely referencing 'corrAns'.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the PsychoPy graphical interface (adding routines, components, editing properties) rather than writing a Python script or XML file manually in a text editor.

integrity.description: The conditions file was genuinely created and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or generating the CSV content in an editor/spreadsheet and saving it to the specified path, rather than just echoing text in a terminal without saving.

integrity.description: The agent built the experiment from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the step-by-step addition of routines and components, rather than simply opening an already completed 'av_simultaneity.psyexp' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/av_simultaneity.psyexp. The conditions file must be at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/soa_conditions.csv, contain columns 'soa_offset' and 'corrAns', have at least 5 rows, and include offsets from at least -0.3 to 0.3. Visual stimuli must start at exactly 0.5s. Sound stimuli start time must use the variable 'soa_offset'.
